message:
fix(tests): propagate &mut Receiver to fault injection test suite

Update drain_receiver helper and all test call sites to use &mut
Receiver, consistent with the &mut self requirement added to
Receiver::recv and try_recv. Affects all 14 fault channel tests
(no_obligation_leak, idempotent_dedup, eventual_delivery,
deterministic_sequence, high_volume_stress, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
